name: Sonora Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 fresh corn tortillas (cut into 1/2 inch strips)
thinly sliced green onions for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomato sauce, ground cumin, cayenne pepper, white vinegar, granulated garlic, and salt to taste in a bowl.
2. Slice six fresh corn tortillas into 1/2 inch strips. Fry in very hot oil until crispy, then drain on paper towels.
3. Steam the zucchini slices until tender, then drain.
4. In a separate dish, combine the cooked zucchini, corn (fresh or canned), diced green chilies, grated cheddar cheese, and fried tortilla strips.
5. Spoon the mixture into a well-oiled 9x12 inch baking dish. Spread the tomato sauce over the top of the mixture, then add another layer of cheddar cheese on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and layer with sour cream and thinly sliced green onions before serving.
